memory:memory/2026-04-25.md:1:22.snippet: # 2026-04-25 - Built and operationalized `skills/affiliate-book-marketing-director` with live-tested comment triage improvements: - Removed private reply flow due to repeated Meta permission/API failures (`/private_replies`, code 100 subcode 33). - Enforced public threaded replies via comment endpoint (`/{comment_id}/comments`). - Added intent routing: `buy_intent` (link reply), `casual` (context reply), `negative_or_spam` (skip). - Added affiliate-link safety: if link is blank/`NONE`, downgrade buy-intent to casual (no broken-link posting). - Dispatch robustness and observability improved: - Added graceful fallback publish mode when Cloudflare creds are missing. - Added Telegr
